Title: Green Leaf Floral Print Unisex Pullover Hoodie
Description:
Enjoy the effortless style and comfort of this unisex pullover hoodie. Featuring a vibrant floral print design on the chest, it's the perfect piece for casual wear, gifting, or lounging.

  • Supreme Comfort: Made from soft, breathable fabric that feels great all day long.
  • Versatile Style: The muted olive green color and classic hoodie design make it pairable with various outfits and occasions.
  • Ideal Gift: Whether for friends, family, or yourself, this hoodie makes a thoughtful and stylish gift.
  • Features: Includes an adjustable drawstring hood and a spacious front kangaroo pocket.

Perfect for outdoor activities, casual outings, or relaxing at home. Pair it with your favorite jeans or joggers for a stylish, comfortable look.
